title: Snake
description: The classic grid-crawler. Eat, grow, and try not to run into yourself. Arrow keys or swipe to steer.
Slide and merge numbered tiles to build up to 2048 (and beyond). One wrong move and it's over.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: Play against a minimax-perfect AI. Good luck ever beating it - a draw is the best you'll usually get.

title: Particle Playground
description: A reactive particle field that follows your cursor. Click to burst, drag to paint trails of light.

title: Falling Sand
description: A pixel-physics sandbox. Drop sand, water, and stone and watch them settle, flow, and pile up.

title: Word Guess
description: Guess the hidden 5-letter word in 6 tries. Green means right spot, yellow means wrong spot.

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: Shuffle the 15-tile board, then slide pieces back into numerical order as fast as you can.

title: Reaction Test
description: Wait for the screen to flash, then click as fast as you can. Measures your reaction time in milliseconds.

title: Aim Trainer
description: Targets pop up at random - click them before they disappear. Tracks accuracy and average speed.

title: Memory Match
description: Flip cards two at a time and match every pair in as few moves as you can. Tracks your best score.

title: Simon Says
description: Watch the colour pattern light up, then repeat it back. Every round adds one more step to remember.

title: Breakout
description: Bounce the ball off your paddle to smash every brick. Mouse, touch, or arrow keys to play.

title: Minesweeper
description: Clear the whole board without detonating a mine. Reveal cells, flag the danger, and beat your best time.

title: Connect Four
description: Drop discs to line up four in a row before the AI does. Horizontal, vertical, or diagonal counts.

title: Whack-a-Mole
description: Tap the moles as fast as they pop up. Thirty seconds on the clock — rack up the highest score you can.

title: Typing Speed Test
description: Type the sentence as fast and accurately as you can. Scores your net WPM and accuracy at the end.

title: Kaleidoscope
description: Draw anywhere and the stroke mirrors around the center with radial symmetry. One gesture, an instant mandala.

title: Game of Life
description: Click cells to seed a pattern, then watch Conway's four simple rules produce gliders, oscillators, and chaos.

title: Boids
description: Craig Reynolds' classic flocking algorithm - separation, alignment, and cohesion produce lifelike flocking from three simple rules.

title: Spirograph
description: The math behind the classic toy: adjust the gear ratio and pen offset with sliders and watch the curve draw itself.

title: Pong
description: The original arcade classic. Move your mouse or finger to control the paddle - first to 7 wins against the AI.

title: Hangman
description: Guess the hidden word one letter at a time before six wrong guesses complete the drawing.

title: Rock Paper Scissors
description: Play against an AI that quietly learns your habits - favor one move too often and it starts countering you.

title: Flappy Blocks
description: Click, tap, or press space to flap and weave through the gaps. One hit and it's over.

title: Tetris
description: Rotate and stack the falling tetrominoes to clear full lines before the board fills up.

title: Sudoku
description: Fill the grid so every row, column, and 3x3 box holds the numbers 1 to 9 exactly once.

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim and fire colored bubbles into the grid — match 3 or more to pop them before they reach the bottom.

title: Tower of Hanoi
description: Move the whole stack from the first peg to the last, one disk at a time, without stacking big on small.

title: Maze Runner
description: Navigate a freshly generated, guaranteed-solvable maze from start to goal.
